name: action-version-hover
description: Shows the release tag or version when hovering over GitHub Action SHA references in workflow files.

actionVersionHover.autoUpdateComment.description: Automatically update trailing '# vX.Y.Z' comments when the SHA on a 'uses:' line changes.

actionVersionHover.autoInsertComment.description: If no version comment exists and there is no other comment on the line, automatically insert '# vX.Y.Z'.

actionVersionHover.updateOn.description: When to run automatic updates: 'save' (safe), 'type' (debounced), or 'open' (when the file is opened).

actionVersionHover.autoUpdateToLatestOnS.description: When saving, automatically update all 'uses:' SHAs to the latest available version for each action (also updates the '# vX.Y.Z' comment). Respects the 'updateOn' trigger setting.
